exemplary.prompt_summary: Assign codes for HTN + CHF + CKD patient
exemplary.response: Based on ICD-10-CM Official Guidelines Section I.C.9.a.3, when hypertension, heart disease, and chronic kidney disease are all documented, the assumed causal relationship requires combination code I13.10 (Hypertensive heart and chronic kidney disease without heart failure, with stage 1 through stage 4 CKD). Additional codes: N18.4 (CKD stage 4), I50.22 (Chronic systolic heart failure). Sequencing: I13.10 first per combination code guidelines, followed by N18.4 to specify CKD stage, then I50.22. The N18.4 is a CC and I50.22 is a CC, which together with I13.10 as PDx should group to MS-DRG 291 (Heart Failure and Shock with MCC).

borderline.prompt_summary: Assign codes for HTN + CHF + CKD patient
borderline.response: Codes: I13.10 for the combination of hypertension and CKD with heart disease. N18.4 for stage 4 CKD. I50.9 for heart failure.
